title: Zomato Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Zomato Holdings Services is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Zomato Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Meerut office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zomato Holdings Services:
Zomato Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Holdings Services!
